content.content:
1	"""VRChat OSC controller — chatbox, params, actions, emotion."""
2	from __future__ import annotations
3	
4	import json
5	import logging
6	from pathlib import Path
7	from typing import Any
8	
9	from pythonosc import dispatcher, osc_server, udp_client
10	
11	ROOT = Path(__file__).parent
12	_PARAM_MAP_PATH = ROOT / "osc_param_map.json"
13	
14	
15	def load_param_map() -> dict:
16	    if _PARAM_MAP_PATH.exists():
17	        return json.loads(_PARAM_MAP_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
18	    return {"emotions": {}, "actions": {}, "voicevox_emotions": {}}
19	
20	
21	class OSCController:
22	    def __init__(
23	        self,
24	        host: str = "127.0.0.1",
25	        port: int = 9000,
26	        param_map: dict | None = None,
27	    ) -> None:
28	        self._client = udp_client.SimpleUDPClient(host, port)
29	        self._map = param_map or load_param_map()
30	
31	    def send_chatbox(self, text: str, immediate: bool = True, sfx: bool = True) -> None:
32	        """Send text to VRChat chatbox with advanced flags."""
33	        self._client.send_message("/chatbox/input", [text, immediate, sfx])
34	
35	    def set_typing(self, typing: bool) -> None:
36	        """Set the VRChat typing indicator."""
37	        address = self._map.get("chatbox", {}).get("typing", "/chatbox/typing")
38	        self._client.send_message(address, typing)
39	
40	    def send_tracking(self, name: str, value: Any) -> None:
41	        """Send tracking or avatar data (eye closed, head pos, etc.)."""
42	        address = self._map.get("tracking", {}).get(name, name)
43	        self._client.send_message(address, value)
44	
45	    def set_param(self, name: str, value: Any) -> None:
46	        """Set a single avatar parameter."""
47	        self._client.send_message(f"/avatar/parameters/{name}", value)
48	
49	    def send_action(self, action: str, value: Any = 1.0) -> None:
50	        """Send a VRChat input action (jump, move, etc.)."""
51	        address = self._map.get("actions", {}).get(action, f"/input/{action}")
52	        # Some inputs like Jump/Run/Voice prefer int(1 or 0)
53	        if any(x in address.lower() for x in ["jump", "run", "voice", "mute"]):
54	            value = int(value)
55	        self._client.send_message(address, value)
56	
57	    def apply_emotion(self, emotion: str) -> None:
58	        """Send all OSC params for a named emotion. Falls back to neutral."""
59	        emotions = self._map.get("emotions", {})
60	        params = emotions.get(emotion) or emotions.get("neutral") or {}
61	        for param_name, param_value in params.items():
62	            self.set_param(param_name, param_value)
63	
64	
65	class OSCListener:
66	    """Listens for VRChat OSC telemetry on port 9001."""
67	    def __init__(self, host: str = "127.0.0.1", port: int = 9001):
68	        self.host = host
69	        self.port = port
70	        self.dispatcher = dispatcher.Dispatcher()
71	        self.telemetry: dict[str, Any] = {}
72	        self._server = None
73	        
74	        # Default handlers
75	        self.dispatcher.map("/avatar/change", self._handle_avatar_change)
76	        self.dispatcher.set_default_handler(self._handle_generic)
77	
78	    def _handle_avatar_change(self, address: str, *args: Any):
79	        avatar_id = args[0] if args else "unknown"
80	        self.telemetry["avatar_id"] = avatar_id
